data.title: Amkor Technology will be presenting at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in Tempe, Arizona.
data.description: Amkor Technology, based in Tempe, Arizona, is scheduled to participate in the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. During the event, the company will present key information to industry professionals and investors. This conference presents a valuable opportunity for Amkor Technology to showcase its advancements and strategies for growth. The event is anticipated to draw a large audience with participation from various sectors, highlighting innovations and trends in the technology, media, and telecom industries.

data.title: QT Imaging (Nasdaq: QTI) announces record revenue in Q4 2025 with highest number of scanners shipped.
data.description: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc., a medical device company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QTI, based in Novato, California, disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the entirety of 2025. The company focuses on revolutionizing breast health management with innovative, radiation-free imaging technology. In the fourth quarter of 2025, a significant milestone was achieved as the company reported record-high quarterly revenue fuelled by an unprecedented quantity of scanners shipped. The solid performance was attributed to robust execution across the board.

data.title: Hammurabi, a division of Xchange Benefits, introduces AI platform transforming medical stop loss underwriting.
data.description: In Armonk, New York, Hammurabi, a Division of Xchange Benefits, has introduced an innovative AI platform that is transforming medical stop loss underwriting. This groundbreaking technology is set to revolutionize the industry with its advanced capabilities. The platform promises to streamline operations and enhance accuracy in underwriting processes, significantly benefiting the medical stop loss sector. This development marks a significant milestone for the company and is expected to have a major impact on the market.

data.title: Ibex Medical Analytics appoints new CEO and expanding biopharma division, amid global growth.
data.description: Ibex Medical Analytics, a global leader in clinical-grade AI-powered pathology based in Boston and Tel Aviv, has reported ongoing commercial success and increased global acceptance. The company has announced a leadership change to drive its next growth phase. Yair Heller, previously the Chief Operating Officer, has been promoted to Chief Executive Officer. Meanwhile, co-founder Joseph Mossel will now focus on leading Ibex's growing biopharma division as of now. This transition aims to fuel the company's development further.

data.title: Asahi Kasei Pharma and Alchemedicine progress AK1960 to Phase I trial for refractory diseases treatment.
data.description: A joint effort between Asahi Kasei Pharma and Alchemedicine has led to the progression of AK1960 to a Phase I clinical trial in Tokyo. The partnership marks a significant milestone in the research and development process. The compound AK1960 is now undergoing testing involving a group of participants, signifying a crucial step forward in the pharmaceutical field. This advancement highlights the promising potential of AK1960, showing promise for potential future medical applications.

data.title: Tempus releases new HRD-RNA algorithm (1,660 genes) for cancer identification in precision medicine.
data.description: Chicago-based technology company Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) has introduced a new HRD-RNA algorithm designed to enhance precision medicine. This advanced model is a major upgrade in detecting Homologous Recombination Deficiency (HRD), offering a more comprehensive evaluation of tumor biology compared to conventional DNA-based tests. The Tempus HRD-RNA algorithm is powered by artificial intelligence and consists of a logistic regression model spanning 1,660 genes.

data.title: MLS partners with Chime as official banking partner in the US, marking Chime's first major investment in soccer.
data.description: In an announcement today in New York, Major League Soccer (MLS) unveiled a fresh partnership with Chime, the #1 Most Loved Banking App in the United States. This multi-year deal designates Chime as the Official Retail Banking, Credit Card, and Debit Card Partner of MLS. It signifies Chime's inaugural significant venture into professional soccer, coinciding with MLS's flourishing presence in North America and globally. This collaboration highlights an exciting period for the league as it expands its cultural influence.

data.title: Schrödinger grants stock options for 9,600 shares and RSUs for 18,250 shares to newly hired employees.
data.description: Schrödinger, Inc. announced today that on February 13, 2026, they provided non-statutory stock options for the acquisition of 9,600 shares of the company's common stock to two recent hires. Additionally, restricted stock units (RSUs) were granted to eight newly recruited employees, involving 18,250 shares of the company's common stock. These allocations were enacted under the corporation's 2021 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan and received authorization from the compensation committee.

data.title: ImmuCell to reveal Q4 and FY 2025 financials on March 5 with conference call at 9:00 AM ET.
data.description: A conference call has been arranged for Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. The call aims to discuss important matters and updates. Those involved are expected to convene at the designated time to address the issues at hand. This meeting holds significance for the organization as crucial decisions are likely to be made. Participants are advised to ensure their presence and punctuality for the 9:00 AM call on March 5, 2026.
